\tzpentry{ID4391}{Current Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4391 introduces Current Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{J}(\bm{\theta}) = \sum_{p \in \mathcal{P}} w_p \int_{\R^3} \int_{\R^3} \bigl| K_p(x_1,x_2;\bm{\theta}) - K_p^{\mathrm{target}}(x_1,x_2) \bigr|^2 \,\mathrm{d}x_1 \mathrm{d}x_2, \label{eq:cost-functional} \end{equation}
